mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, pay_amount, pay_time, remark, address_snapshot, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO normal_order ( order_no, user_id, order_status, total_amount, pay_amount, pay_time, remark, address_snapshot ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{orderStatus}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{payTime}, #{remark}, #{addressSnapshot} )
